name: issta-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ISSTA submissions: routing testing-and-analysis work into the SIGSOFT venue, HotCRP double-anonymous submission checks, the major-revision review cycle, author response, ACM-badged artifact evaluation, reproducibility, replication packages, review process, writing style, related work, benchmark-driven experiments, and the campaign workflow. Grounded in the official ISSTA 2026 Research Papers call, important-dates page, artifact-evaluation track, and ACM DL proceedings checked on 2026-07-09.
